placements.overview:
Founded in 2006, S.B. Group Of Institution is a private institute. It is located in Bangalore, Karnataka. The institute is accredited with AICTE. S.B. Group Of Institution provides UG and PG courses in Full Time mode. It provides 13 courses across specialisations such as Acting and Sales & Marketing. Some of the courses offered at this institute include MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., BCA, B.Com and BBA. S.B. Group Of Institution fees ranges between INR 1,08,780 to 2,00,000. The student intake for these courses is 410. S.B. Group Of Institution offers these course across fields such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Design and Mass Communication & Media. S.B. Group Of Institution offers all the campus facilities to students.

S.B. Group Of Institution offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Whereas, at PG level, S.B. Group Of Institution offers courses such as MBA/PGDM, M.Com and PG Diploma. S.B. Group Of Institution fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,08,780 to 2,00,000.

A hallmark of this institute is an all-inclusive learning experience to its students through extracurricular activities as well as resources such as Auditorium, Boys Hostel, Cafeteria, Girls Hostel, Gym, Hospital / Medical Facilities, Hostel, Labs, Library, Sports Complex, Wi-Fi Campus.

reviews_list.review_title: Campus environment at SRAMC is good.

review_content.Placements: It offers B.A.M.S. degree, after which you can work in any medical fields and in hospital as a doctor, also provides you the license for opening clinics as a medical practitioner. Everyone after graduation gets 1 year of internship here in the same hospital in which the college is present.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classroom are bit old fashioned with blackboard, but renovation is going on right now. Library is well-maintained with all the extra books are needed. Hostel environment is really good, the only thing not good is mess food, the food served is just average and tastes same every time what ever the food item is made.

reviews_list.batch_info: BAMS - Bachelor of Ayurvedic Medicine and Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Shree Raghavendra Ayurvedic Medical College and Hospital.

review_content.Placements: After passing out, many students work in hospitals with a good salary as doctors, and some students open their own clinics. Every hospital is ready to take a BAMS doctor. As it is a medical degree, every student gets an internship just after clearing the final year exam as a doctor.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very weak, except for the hostel. The hostel is very good, but the college building is horrible and old as it has always been present. Food quality in the mess is average, but the food quality can get better. Otherwise, hostels are very good and comfortable to live in.
